fields.name: Dependency Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies a dependency to the synchronization of another record, such as a customer that must be synchronized before a contact can be synchronized.

fields.name: To Int. Table Job Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of jobs for data going to the integration table.

fields.name: From Int. Table Job Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of jobs for data coming from the integration table.

fields.name: Direction
fields.tooltip: Specifies the direction in which data will synchronize.

fields.name: Job Queue Entry Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the job queue entry.

fields.name: Multi Company Synch. Enabled
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the multi-company synchronization should be enabled for the corresponding integration table mapping.
